options.name: --force-recreate
options.description: Recreate containers even if their configuration and image haven't changed. Incompatible with --no-recreate

options.name: --no-recreate
options.description: If containers already exist, don't recreate them. Incompatible with --force-recreate

options.name: --no-build
options.description: Don't build an image, even if it's missing
